channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Search continues for missing swimmer at Trigg Beach
item.description: Authorities in Western Australia are continuing their search for a swimmer who went missing near Trigg Beach, specifically at the area known as The Blue Hole. The emergency call was made shortly after...

item.title: Yoweri Museveni Begins Seventh Term as Uganda’s President Amid Succession Talks
item.description: Uganda’s long-serving leader, Yoweri Museveni, has officially kicked off another five-year term after a colourful swearing-in ceremony held at Kololo Ceremonial Grounds in Kampala. The event drew seve...

item.title: Man sentenced for posing as a mute wheelchair user to commit sexual offences
item.description: A man convicted of paedophilic offences has been sentenced to prison after it was revealed he pretended to be a mute wheelchair user in order to carry out his crimes. The individual exploited this fal...

item.title: Calgary City Council Discusses Pay for New Water Oversight Board
item.description: Calgary’s mayor, Jeromy Farkas, has defended the proposed compensation for the newly established Water Utility Oversight Board, describing it as 'money well spent' despite some concerns from city coun...

item.title: Linet Toto Emotional During Community Event as Bomet Residents Show Support
item.description: Bomet woman representative Linet Toto Chepkorir was visibly emotional during a recent community gathering as residents cheered her re-election campaign. Accompanied by her husband, Godfrey Kimutai, an...

item.title: President Ramaphosa Updates Nation on Government Response to Severe Weather and Flooding
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has expressed deep concern over the recent severe weather events affecting various provinces in South Africa, which have tragically claimed at least ten lives. The extreme co...

item.title: 1975 Chicago Auto Show Highlights and Style Icons
item.description: The 1975 Chicago Auto Show, held at McCormick Place from February 22 to March 2, represented a significant moment in American automotive history. In the wake of the energy crisis, the industry began f...

item.title: Learning Kiswahili: Understanding the term 'Kifaranga cha Kuku'
item.description: This article is part of a Kiswahili learning series for beginners and focuses on the term 'Kifaranga cha Kuku', which translates to 'chicken chick' in English. It provides learners with context and us...

item.title: AFP monitors 35 Chinese ships near key areas in West Philippine Sea
item.description: Between May 4 and May 11, the Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) observed 35 Chinese vessels around four strategic locations in the West Philippine Sea (WPS). According to Rear Admiral Roy Vincent ...

item.title: Enugu State ramps up efforts to enroll residents in health insurance scheme for better healthcare access
item.description: The Enugu State Government don announce say dem dey step up their efforts to get more people to join the Universal Health Coverage scheme so dat residents go fit access affordable healthcare. Edith Ok...

item.title: Dr Nkosazana Dlamini Zuma confirms she is not related to singer Nkosazana Daughter
item.description: Former minister and ANC stalwart Dr Nkosazana Dlamini Zuma took to social media to clear up confusion regarding her relationship with the rising South African amapiano artist Nkosazana Daughter. Many ...

item.title: IHC Reviews Adiala Jail Report on Meetings of Former PM Imran Khan and Bushra Bibi
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The Islamabad High Court (IHC) on Tuesday considered a petition regarding meetings of former first lady Bushra Bibi with her family and personal doctor at Adiala Jail. Bushra Bibi’s daughte...

item.title: Analysis of Nigeria’s White Population and Their Roles
item.description: As of 2026, Nigeria get population of about 242 million people, making am the most populous country for Africa and sixth for the world. When we talk about white people for Nigeria, the number dey real...

item.title: China’s Tianzhou-10 Cargo Spacecraft Transported Vertically to Launch Site
item.description: China has moved its Tianzhou-10 cargo spacecraft, paired with a Long March-7 Y11 carrier rocket, vertically to the launch site in Hainan Province. The vertical transfer is a key step in preparing for ...

item.title: IMD forecasts southwest monsoon onset over Bay of Bengal and Andaman Sea by weekend
item.description: The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has forecast that the southwest monsoon is likely to begin over parts of the south Bay of Bengal, Andaman Sea, and Andaman & Nicobar Islands towards the end o...

item.title: Algoma Steel Posts $159.4-Million Loss in Q1 Amid Transition to Electric Arc Furnace
item.description: Algoma Steel Group Inc. reported a net loss of $159.4 million for the first quarter, a significant increase from the $24.5 million loss recorded during the same period last year. The loss per diluted ...

item.title: Federal MP Nate Erskine-Smith Challenges Scarborough Southwest Liberal Nomination Results
item.description: Federal MP Nate Erskine-Smith has formally filed an appeal after narrowly losing the Ontario Liberal nomination in the Scarborough Southwest riding, creating uncertainty for the party ahead of a poten...

item.title: PM ensures steady fertiliser supply to support national agriculture
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif on Tuesday stressed the importance of maintaining a steady supply of fertiliser for farmers across Pakistan to ensure the country’s food security. During a meeting in Isl...

item.title: Tanzanian Golfers Impress at 2026 Ladies Amateur Strokeplay Championship in Kenya
item.description: During the 2026 Ladies Amateur Strokeplay Championship held at Limuru Country Club in Kenya, Tanzanian golfers showed strong performances, with Arusha Gymkhana Club's Neema Olomi leading the pack. Ove...

item.title: Tamil Nadu trust vote: Impact on Vijay's government and AIADMK's unity
item.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay is facing a trust vote for his TVK-led coalition government, which, despite being new, relies on support from Congress, VCK, CPI, CPM, and IUML to cross the ma...
